g.text: Apply a kustomize overlay to the current KinD cluster, wait for its STATUS.yaml `verify:` resources, and run the
Python major/minor version used in Airflow image for images.
Kubernetes version used to create the KinD cluster of.
Executor to use for a kubernetes cluster.
Substitute for the RELEASE-NAME placeholder in the overlay.
Namespace to apply into and substitute for the NAMESPACE placeholder.
Leave the overlay applied after the run (useful for debugging).
Skip the per-overlay pytest module even if it exists.
If the run is green (verify block + per-overlay pytest both pass), rewrite the overlay's
STATUS.yaml in place to `status: tested` with chart-version from chart/Chart.yaml and
today's date as last-verified. Opt-in because it modifies a checked-in file; review with
`git diff` and commit. Refused when CI=true.
Print verbose information about performed steps.
If dry-run is set, commands are only printed, not executed.
